GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup Enablement System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C- 000 ( Global Extens ion Control ) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the followin g information: right 164262 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is uneditable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. 2343785 9036050 Page 3 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 3 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 right 353276 0 0 Click ADD. right 196502 Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code Parameters Screen is displayed. 0 310515 0 0 Click ADD button. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. 2343785 9036050 Page 4 of 12 0 0 Page 4 of 12 C-000 -000 Enablement Click on the Parameters tab right 417195 C heck the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. 2343785 9036050 Page 5 of 12 0 0 Page 5 of 12 2. ADD C-0 0 0-EX 14 CODE ID TO C- 000 GOLBAL CODE Add C-000-EX14 281967 551464 0 0 Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- 000 - EX 14 if it has not been added. Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. 291465 99060 0 0 Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. 2343785 9036050 Page 6 of 12 0 0 Page 6 of 12 C- 000 - EX 14 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. center 337239 0 0 Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. 2343785 9036050 Page 7 of 12 0 0 Page 7 of 12 2. ADD EX14 TRANSACTON PARAMETERS 1.1 ADD ex14 PARAMETER Navigate to Transaction Parameters UI. right 328930 0 Search for any RF ‘ Pck Cubed Dir’ transaction. Click the Checkbox for the preferred transaction . Click on the Parameters Tab. Click on the Program Template action button . center 0 Page 8 of 12 0 0 Page 8 of 12 center top Page 8 of 12 0 0 Page 8 of 12 Click ADD. 505460 111125 0 0 Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot below . 505460 134620 0 0 Click SAVE. center top Page 9 of 12 0 0 Page 9 of 12 1.2 ENABLE EX14 PARAMETER Navigate back to the transaction parameter page in the Transaction Parameters UI. Use the blue action arrows to find transaction parameters 507 to 50 7 . Ensure the Parameter value for parameter 507 is “Yes” . I f the Parameter value for 507 is 'No', click the checkbox to select the RF PCK CUBED DIR transaction. Click the Edit action button. 523549 116484 0 0 Use the blue action arrows to find transaction parameter 507 . Click to select the checkboxes for parameter 507 . Click SAVE. center top Page 10 of 12 0 0 Page 10 of 12 3. MESSAGES SETUP 1.1 Configure Message Navigate to Messages (Configuration) UI. Click Message Master. -635 382270 0 Click the + icon to create a new message. left 570405 0 Populate the fields above with information provided in the screenshot below.
